heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 1071 to 1074 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 1071, , pt. V, § 501, , prescribed composition of Naval Militia. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 500section 7851 of Title 10
Section 1072, , pt. V, § 502, , provided for appointment and enlistment of militia members in Naval Reserve or Marine Corps Reserve. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 500section 7852 of Title 10
Section 1073, , pt. V, § 503, , provided for release from militia duty upon order to active duty in service of United States. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 500section 7853 of Title 10
Section 1074, , pt. V, § 504, , related to availability of supplies and equipment. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 500section 7854 of Title 10
